title: NA-Non ULIP
word_text:
Why Should You Buy Life Insurance Online?
Today is the age of digitisation as technology has taken advanced steps to make life easier. The internet can give you the solution for almost everything, whether it is looking up information, making purchases, or even doing financial transactions.
With the rising popularity and usage of the internet, life insurance policies to have gone digital. Now, you can buy the plan online through various means that include –
The insurance company’s website
Insurance aggregator platforms
Online brokers
Online insurance agents
This has simplified the buying process and even made it more convenient. Here are some of the benefits of buying life insurance online.
Benefits of buying life insurance online
Easy purchase process:
The online purchase process is easy and convenient. You don’t have to step out and visit the insurance company or look for an agent. You can simply go online, fill up an online proposal form and buy the policy from the comfort of your home or office.
Many insurance companies also facilitate video KYC through which your identity is authenticated. You can e-sign the proposal form to get the policy issued online with the minimum of hassles.
Complete transparency:
When you buy online, the complete details of the policy and the insurance company are available at your disposal. You can read through the policy terms and conditions and benefits structure and understand what you are buying. This removes any ambiguity or bad intent that insurance agents might have in selling the policy. You can assess the coverage, see if it meets your needs, and then make an informed decision about buying the policy.
Lower premiums:
When you buy a life insurance policy directly from the insurance company, the middleman or intermediary is eliminated. As the intermediary is eliminated, so is the commission cost payable to him. As the commission is eliminated, the premium reduces. Thus, in many cases, buying online can give you lower premiums.
Secured transactions:
If you purchase a life insurance policy through a reputed and trusted website, your transaction will be secured through encrypted data. You can buy the plan without worrying about online fraud or cyberattacks.
Quick policy issuance:
When you submit the online proposal for insurance, the insurance company gets the proposal in real time. The company can then underwrite the proposal and grant the coverage earlier. Thus, with online plans, the delays of offline purchases are cut down, and you get quick coverage.
Automatic policy servicing:
After you buy the policy online, you can set up an auto debit mandate on your bank account to pay the premium as and when it is due. This auto debit mandate allows the premiums to be deducted from your bank account without your intervention. The premiums are automatically paid, and you can avoid lapses due to forgetfulness.
Moreover, you get online reminders from your insurer about the renewal date and other service-related requests or queries that you might raise. This makes servicing the policy easier.
Ease of calculating your coverage with online calculators:
Online life insurance calculators are available that help you calculate the ideal coverage levels. You can use these life insurance calculators and find out how much sum assured you should buy and what the premium would be for the same.
Ease of comparison:
When you buy online, you can compare similar policies offered by different insurers. Online insurance aggregators and brokers help you compare and pick the right life insurance plan that matches your needs. You can get a comprehensive scope of coverage at competitive premium rates when you compare.
Things to remember about online purchases
While online purchases are quite beneficial, here are a few things that you should remember when you buy life insurance online –
If you are not aware of insurance technicalities and jargon, you might not understand the policy terms and conditions even when they are available online. In such cases, you might need the help of a professional agent or intermediary to help you with the purchase.
You don’t get personalised assistance from an agent for renewals or claims when you buy the policy online, directly from the insurer.
Though life insurance calculators are available online, you might have difficulty using them. In such cases, too, personalised assistance from an agent might be needed.
If you are not tech-savvy, you should choose the traditional route and buy the policy offline.
Even with online purchases, you might have to undergo a pre-entrance health check-up when buying the policy.
You have to pay the premium online when you buy through the online platform.
At the time of a claim, there would be no agent to help you with the settlement. You should, thus, understand the claim process and follow it yourself.
The online medium is definitely beneficial. However, ensure that you understand the detailed terms of the policy when you buy it online. If you have queries or confusion, you can connect with the insurance company that would give personalised assistance and helps you buy the life insurance plan online, without hassles.
Check out the life insurance plans available online and buy them if they match your investment needs and requirements.
Disclaimer:
The views stated in this article are not to be construed as investment advice and readers are suggested to seek independent financial advice before making any investment decisions. For more details on risk factors, terms and conditions please read the sales brochure & policy document (available on www.bajajallianzlife.com) carefully before concluding a sale. full_pdf_text:
Why Should You Consider Buying Life Insurance Online?
Today is the age of digitisation as technology has taken advanced steps to make life easier. Internet can give you the solution for almost everything, whether it is looking up information, making purchases, or even doing financial transactions.
With the rising popularity and usage of the internet, life insurance policies have also gone digital. Now, you can buy the plan online through various means that include –
1. The insurance company’s website 2. Insurance aggregator platforms 3. Online brokers 4. Online insurance agents
This has simplified the buying process and even made it more convenient. Here are some of the benefits of buying life insurance online.
Some Benefits of buying life insurance online
1. Easy purchase process:
The online purchase process is easy and convenient. You don’t have to step out and visit the insurance company or look for an agent. You can simply go online, fill up an online proposal form, submit the required documents, make online premium payment and buy the policy from the comfort of your home or office. Many insurance companies also facilitate video KYC through which your identity is authenticated. Furthermore, there are facilities of eKYC and CKYC etc. through which insurance policies can be sold online without the need for the policyholder to be physically present.. 2. Complete transparency:
When you buy an insurance policy, the complete details of the policy and the insurance company are easily available. You can read through the policy terms and conditions and benefits structure, make comparison with similar products and understand what you are buying.. You can assess the coverage, see if it meets your needs, and then make an informed decision about buying the policy. 3. Lower premiums:
When you buy a life insurance policy directly from the insurance company, the middleman or intermediary is eliminated. As the intermediary is eliminated, so is the commission cost payable to him. As the commission is eliminated, the premium reduces. Thus, in many cases, buying online can give you affordable premiums. 4. Secured transactions:
If you purchase a life insurance policy through the website of the insurer or its registered intermediary, your transaction will be secured through encrypted data. 5. Quick policy issuance:
When you submit the online proposal for insurance, the insurance company gets the proposal in real time. This helps the insurance company in expediting the processing of the proposals and ensure faster issuance of the policies. 6. Ease of calculating your coverage with online calculators:
Online life insurance calculators are available that help you calculate the estimated insurance coverage required after considering various factors. You can use these life insurance calculators and find out how much sum assured you should buy and what the premium would be for the same. 7. Ease of comparison:
When you buy online, you can compare similar policies offered by different insurers. Online insurance aggregators and brokers help you compare and pick the suitable life insurance plan that matches your needs. You can get a comprehensive scope of coverage at competitive premium rates when you compare.
The online medium is convenient. However, ensure that you understand the detailed terms of the policy when you buy it online. If you have queries or confusion, you can connect with the insurance company for assistance to help you buy the life insurance plan online, without hassles.
Check out the life insurance plans available online and consider buying them if they match your investment needs and requirements.
Disclaimer: The views stated in this article are not to be construed as investment advice and readers are suggested to seek independent financial advice before making any investment decisions. For more details on risk factors, terms and conditions please read the sales brochure & policy document (available on www.bajajallianzlife.com) carefully before concluding a sale.
